_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: AI Assistant — Decouple from page URL, persist per-project tab, and surface an always-visible context-usage progress bar

steps.description: Add GET /api/chat/projects endpoint returning enabled projects sorted alphabetically by display_name; same auth posture as the rest of dashboard/routers/chat.py

Add project selector dropdown in chat_assistant/panel.html; introduce _assistantProjectId() / _setAssistantProjectId() backed by localStorage key 'iw-chat-assistant-project'; replace every _currentProjectId() call inside chat.js; remove URL parsing from the chat module except as a one-time seed

Replace sessionStorage key 'iw-chat-active-tab-<browserTabId>' with localStorage key 'iw-chat-active-tab:<projectId>'; on bootstrap and project-switch, restore the project's last active tab; fall back to _tabs[0] when stale
Alembic data migration: backfill agent_runtime_options.context_window_tokens for Pi-allow-listed models in projects.toml; idempotent UPDATE WHERE context_window_tokens IS NULL; no DDL
QV: Alembic migration round-trip + drift check

Extend GET /api/chat/tabs/{tab_id} session payload with used_tokens, window_tokens, and explicit context_pct_status ('known' | 'unknown_window' | 'unknown_runtime'); keep existing context_pct unchanged for known cases; touch orch/chat/context_usage.py for the status resolution

Replace text badge with inline progress bar (~60px x 5px) + numeric percentage in chat_assistant/composer.html; color states green/amber/red; render unknown state explicitly with — percent label and tooltip; never display:none while a tab is active
Dashboard + integration tests for AC1–AC4: project decoupling, per-project tab restoration, progress-bar rendering across known/unknown branches, migration round-trip
Per-agent consolidated review of S01–S08 against the design doc; one pass over the shared code locality
Cross-agent final review of all changes for consistency, integration correctness, and AC coverage
QV: Lint (Ruff + node --check + template check)
QV: Format check (Ruff)
QV: Type checking (mypy)
QV: Architecture boundary check
QV: Security SAST
QV: Unit tests
QV: Frontend tests (dashboard suite)
QV: Integration tests
QV: Browser verification — end-to-end check of project switching, tab restoration, and the progress bar (known + unknown states)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
